description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow set on a rectangular plot with a well-manicured lawn and landscaping that includes palm trees and flowering shrubs. The structure features a flat roof and a clean, geometric layout with large windows and multiple entry points. The front of the bungalow has a driveway leading to a garage, with two cars parked outside, and a paved walkway to the main entrance. The rear of the property includes a patio area and additional green space, bordered by trees for privacy. The exterior walls are primarily white with accents of wood and glass, giving the building a contemporary appearance. The overall design emphasizes open spaces, natural light, and integration with the surrounding garden.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and landscaped surroundings featuring palm trees and flowering shrubs. The exterior is white with wood and glass accents, and the property includes a driveway, garage, and patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, two parked cars, main entrance, and landscaped garden with palm trees and flowering shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, side windows, and dense tree coverage along the property edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the patio area, backyard greenery, and the flat roof structure with visible window placements.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the secondary entrance, additional windows, and lush landscaping with trees and shrubs.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and glass doors
